# Mubashir Rehman

> Backend engineer who ships AI & automation into production. Primary backend
> owner of multi-tenant production platforms (Python, Django/DRF, FastAPI,
> PostgreSQL, Docker, AWS) with hands-on LLM/RAG work, and co-author of
> peer-reviewed ML research. Based in Lahore, Pakistan; open to remote roles in
> any timezone.

## About

- Name: Mubashir Rehman
- Role: Backend / AI Backend Engineer & Team Lead
- Location: Lahore, Pakistan — available for remote work in any timezone; on-site in Lahore optional
- Focus: backend APIs, LLM/RAG and AI automation, ERP/HRMS and internal tooling, with shipped React/TypeScript front-ends
- Core stack: Python, Django, Django REST Framework, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, Redis, Docker, AWS, GitHub Actions; LLM tooling (OpenAI, Gemini, LangChain/LangGraph, pgvector, vLLM/LiteLLM)
- Site: https://mubashir-rehman.is-a.dev

## Hire me for (role tracks)

- [AI Backend Engineer](https://mubashir-rehman.is-a.dev/for/ai-backend): Backend systems for LLMs, RAG, and AI automation — in production.
- [Backend / API Engineer](https://mubashir-rehman.is-a.dev/for/backend): Python, Django/FastAPI, PostgreSQL, Docker — REST APIs and systems that hold up.
- [ERP / HRMS & Internal Tools Engineer](https://mubashir-rehman.is-a.dev/for/erp-hrms): Django HRMS, ERPNext/Frappe, biometric attendance, and internal workflow automation.
- [Full-Stack Engineer (backend-leaning)](https://mubashir-rehman.is-a.dev/for/full-stack): Backend depth with shipped React/TypeScript front-ends and product workflows.

## Featured projects

- Healthcare HL7 Integration Platform (product name under NDA): Production full-stack work — React 19 + TypeScript frontend and Node.js + TypeScript BFF — on a commercial HL7 integration engine; top contributor.
- [HireTrack — AI Résumé Builder & Job Pipeline Tracker](https://mubashir-rehman.is-a.dev/projects): Open-source, bring-your-own-key web app that tailors ATS-ready résumés and tracks a job-application pipeline (React 19, Vite, LangGraph, Supabase, Gemini).
- AI-Powered LinkedIn Content Platform: Primary Django REST Framework backend developer on a production AI content platform.
- AI-Driven Cryptocurrency Intelligence Platform: Real-time intelligence backend (data ingestion, LLM analysis) built as sole engineer.
- Enterprise HRMS Migration & Automation: Migrated and extended a Django HRMS (Horilla) for a ~200-employee organization.
- ERPNext / Frappe Customization & Internal Tooling: Custom doctypes, server scripts, and workflow automation on Frappe/ERPNext v16.

## Research

- Evaluation of a Low-Cost Single-Lead ECG Module for Vascular Ageing Prediction and Studying Smoking-Induced Changes in ECG. Circuits, Systems, and Signal Processing (CSSP), Springer, 2025. DOI: 10.1007/s00034-025-03048-2. One of three equal-contribution authors; contributed data collection, ML pipeline, and model training/evaluation.

## Services (for clients)

- Fixed-scope projects and retainer/contract work: backend & API development, AI/LLM features (RAG, semantic search, automation pipelines), ERP/HRMS customization, and integrations.
- Details: https://mubashir-rehman.is-a.dev/services
